During upkeep (R8) the engine 'drew Mob Enforcer [pc0033]' from my player deck and spawned it as a HOSTILE ENEMY (01101: Prey Bearer-only, Hunter, fight 4) that engaged me and attacked. pc0033 is the player Ally 'Mob Enforcer' in the core set — a player card should not become a hostile enemy on draw. Either the code mapping is wrong (pc0033 vs enemy 01101) or player deck cards are being treated as encounter spawns. Rules: cards drawn from your deck during upkeep go to hand, they do not spawn as enemies.
